news.title:

news.title:
Geopolitical tensions challenge India's auto industry with raw material and energy strains impacting production and exports.
Tata Motors and Mahindra manage supply risks; MSMEs face shutdowns. Firms shift to localisation, inventory buffers, and logistical reroutes.
news.summary:
Geopolitical tensions challenge India's auto industry with raw material and energy strains impacting production and exports.

news.title:

The company expects no material impact on operations or outlook from the pause.

news.title:
Sensex fell 2.25%, Nifty 50 dropped 2.09%, eroding ₹9 lakh crore market cap as 906 stocks hit 52-week lows.
